# Ingredients

Grocery List

 \normalsize

- 1/2 cup pumpkin
- 1/2 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 6-8 slices of bread
- 1 eggplant
- 4 garlic cloves
- 4 ounces shredded mozzarella cheese
- 1/4 cup panko breadcrumbs
- 1 shallot
- 2 tsp Italian seasoning
- 1 can of fire roasted diced tomatoes
- 1 cup couscous
- 1 lemon
- 1 0.25 oz package of fresh basil
- 1 pound pasta (e.g., fettuccine or bucatini)
- 1 pound chicken breast.
- 6 tablespoons butter
- 4 garlic cloves
- 1.5 cups heavy cream
- 3/4 cup parmesan cheese
- 1 zucchini
- 1 shallot
- 12 oz baby broccoli
- 8 oz mozzarella
- 1/4 cup parmesan
- 2 cups flour + up to 1/2 cup
- 1 packet instant yeast
- 1.5 tsp sugar
- 1 tsp salt
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 3/4 cup warm water

 \normalsize

\newpage

# Recipe One

 \normalsize

![Eggplant Parmesan](website/images/EggplantParmesan.jpg){width=50%}

 \normalsize

**Ingredients**

 \normalsize

- 1 eggplant
- 4 garlic cloves
- 4 ounces shredded mozzarella cheese
- 1/4 cup panko breadcrumbs
- 1 shallot
- 2 tsp Italian seasoning
- 1 can of fire roasted diced tomatoes
- 1 cup couscous
- 1 lemon
- 1 0.25 oz package of fresh basil

 \normalsize

**Instructions**

 \normalsize

1. Cut ends off eggplant, peel, and slice eggplant lengthwise into 4 slices. Mince garlic and shallot. Zest lemon, cut into wedges adn juice half of them. Roughly chop basil.
1. Coat eggplant in olive oil and season with salt and pepper. Cook in an oven at 425 degrees for 20 minutes, flipping halfway.
1. Mix half the garlic, and the mozzarella, breadcrumbs and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
1. Cook remaining garlic, shallot in olive oil. Add Italian seasoning and cook until fragrant.
1. Add tomatoes, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Simmer until thickened, about 10 minutes.
1. Cook couscous according to package instructions. Remove from heat and stir in lemon zest and juice, half the basil, and a tablespoon of olive oil.
1. Top eggplant with tomato sauce and breadcrumbs, and cook an additional 5-10 minutes.
1. Serve topped with remaining basil and lemon.

 \normalsize

\newpage

# Recipe Two

 \normalsize

![Alfredo Pasta (Serves 4)](website/images/Alfredo.jpg){width=50%}

 \normalsize

**Ingredients**

 \normalsize

- 1 pound pasta (e.g., fettuccine or bucatini)
- 1 pound chicken breast.
- 6 tablespoons butter
- 4 garlic cloves
- 1.5 cups heavy cream
- 3/4 cup parmesan cheese
- 1 zucchini
- 1 shallot

 \normalsize

**Instructions**

 \normalsize

1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
1. Season chicken with olive oil, salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Cook on rimmed baking sheet until cooked 15-25 minutes.
1. Mince garlic, cut zucchini into half moons, and dice shallot.
1. Melt butter in a large frying pan. Add garlic, cook until just starting to brown (1-2 minutes).
1. Add zucchini to the pan and cook until tender.
1. Add heavy cream to pan and simmer for about ten minutes.
1. Add in parmesan cheese and stir until smooth. Remove from heat.
1. When ready, boil pasta according to package instructions. Save a cup of pasta water.
1. Mix pasta and sauce. If needed, add pasta water to loosen the sauce.
1. Serve with grated Parmesan.

 \normalsize

\newpage

# Recipe Three


 \normalsize

![Pizza](website/images/Pizza.jpg){width=50%}

 \normalsize

**Ingredients**

 \normalsize

- 12 oz baby broccoli
- 8 oz mozzarella
- 1/4 cup parmesan
- 2 cups flour + up to 1/2 cup
- 1 packet instant yeast
- 1.5 tsp sugar
- 1 tsp salt
- 2 tablespoons olive oil
- 3/4 cup warm water

 \normalsize

**Instructions**

 \normalsize

1. Drizzle baby broccoli with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Bake at 400 degrees for 15-20 minutes until bright green and tender.
1. Mix 1 cup flour, instant yeast, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
1. Stir in olive oil and warm water. Ensure water is 100-105 degrees.
1. Stir in 1 cup of flour and work into a dough. Add more flour if needed.
1. Oil the sides of a medium bowl and and add pasta dough. Cover and set aside until it doubles in size (20-40 minutes).
1. On a lightly floured surface, knead dough until smooth.
1. Roll out into a circle, and place it on an oiled cookie sheet.
1. Drizzle olive oil over the pizza dough. Then top with sauce, broccoli, and cheese.
1. Cook on bottom shelf of the oven for 15-20 minutes.

 \normalsize

\newpage

# Breakfast Recipe

 \normalsize

![Pumpkin Toast (Serves 4)](website/images/PumpkinToast.jpg){width=50%}

 \normalsize

**Ingredients**

 \normalsize

- 1/2 cup pumpkin
- 1/2 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 6-8 slices of bread

 \normalsize

**Instructions**

 \normalsize

1. Mix pumpkin, milk, eggs, cinnamon, and vanilla in a medium bowl.
1. Dip a slice of bread, coat in pumpkin mixture, and cook in a generous amount of butter.
1. Repeat until pumpkin mixture runs out.
1. Serve with syrup, berries, and/or whipped cream.

 \normalsize
